title: vdd/mod.rs: pub use confabulation::ConfabulationTracker leaks internal type — only used inside blocking_loop
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Dimension: Structural Modularity / Encapsulation. Location: src/vdd/mod.rs:21-24 (public re-exports). Violation: ConfabulationTracker is re-exported publicly, but grep shows it is used only inside VddEngine::blocking_loop (line 411) — it is an implementation detail of the blocking mode, not a public abstraction consumers need. Same for VddIteration, AdversaryReview (these are serialization types for session persistence, not library-consumer types). The public re-exports pin the internal data model to the outside world, preventing refactors like splitting VddSession into domain+persistence types. Mandated Refactor: Narrow the pub use list to Finding, FindingStatus, Severity, VddError, VddResult, VddAdvisoryResult, VddBlockingResult, VddEngine — the entry-point types only. Make ConfabulationTracker, VddIteration, AdversaryReview pub(crate).
